help: Shows the list of available commands
set_prefix {prefix}: Sets bot's prefix for current server
join: Makes the bot join the voice channel you're in
leave: Makes the bot leave the voice channel he's in on this server
play {url/title}: Makes the bot play music from youtube
search {title}: Searching for a song on youtube
queue <title/url>: Shows current playlist or adds a new track to it
stop: Stops the bot from playing music
remove {index}: Removes a specified track from the queue
